title: Work, Neighbor, Work!
content:
"Work, neighbor, work!
        Do not stop to play;
        Wander far and wide,
        Gather all you may.

        We are never like
        Idle butterflies,
        But like the busy bees,
        Industrious and wise."
meaning:
Louisa May Alcott's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Work, Neighbor, Work!"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
